reason: Layer split for the new callable: handler in handlers/discordChat.ts (auth + arg validation only), agentic loop in flows/discordChat.ts, the AI-callable search primitive in tools/discordSearch.ts, system prompt in prompts/discordChat.ts. Mirrors the assignTask handler/flow/tool/prompt split.

searchDiscordMessages reads apps/gitsync/repos/{repoId}/discordMessages orderBy('timestamp','desc').limit(N). NOTE: messages have NO embedding (onDiscordMessageCreated still stub) so this is keyword+recency, no findNearest / no vector index. Path convention + read-only (discordMessages is client-write-blocked).

HttpsError codes: failed-precondition when not logged in, invalid-argument for missing repoId/empty question. Rule D best-effort: searchDiscordMessages must NOT throw — degrade to [] + logger.warn so one bad tool call can't kill the chat flow.

v2-only, region asia-east1 (REGION from admin), secrets:[openaiKey] on the onCall. Function-calling via openai.chat.completions.create({tools, tool_choice:'auto'}) looped — same pattern as assignTask, NOT the .beta parse path. Use MODELS.fast for chat.
firebase-functions structured logger to trace each agentic round + tool call + the round-limit fallback.

Reuse the assignTaskFlow agentic loop skeleton (tool schema array, safeParse, round loop, push tool results). Extract a pure rankMessages() core out of searchDiscordMessages so it is unit-testable without Firestore. Reuse existing MarkdownView widget for the AI answer.

Return shape {answer, messages:[{messageId,authorName,content,channelId,timestamp}]} must be consumed by functions_service.dart (live + fake) and discord_chat_vm.dart. Surfaced messages = union of all searchDiscordMessages hits across rounds, deduped by messageId. Timestamp serialized as ISO string (callable can't return Firestore Timestamp).
New DiscordChatViewModel (ChangeNotifier) holding the conversation turns + sending flag + ask(question); provided alongside DiscordMessagesViewModel in app_router.dart MultiProvider.

Discord tab UI: chat transcript + bottom input; each AI turn embeds a fixed-height internally-scrollable panel of cited messages. Guard async gaps with mounted checks; reuse theme/AppDimens and MarkdownView.

Fake/Live split: add discordChat to the abstract FunctionsService, _LiveFunctionsService (httpsCallable), and FakeFunctionsService (canned answer over DummyData.discordMessages so the chat demos without secrets).
